summary: Adversarial correction for FR-15.13 thumbnail capture ordering, async identity guards, durable browser profile persistence, Welcome refresh, file-tree focus dismissal, and evidence accuracy.

decisions.decision: Resize the renderer before rendering the fixed thumbnail, restore the viewport in finally, and gate asynchronous 2D/3D callbacks by generation and one in-flight capture.
decisions.rationale: The first implementation could encode stale/blank buffers or let old promises overwrite a newer identity. The corrected ordering and guards make failure and replacement safe.

decisions.decision: Use an app-owned browser profile storage namespace for render thumbnails rather than the ephemeral no-op port; desktop retains strict opaque desktop keys.
decisions.rationale: FR-15.13 requires durable non-source workspace state on the web target as well as desktop.

decisions.decision: Welcome reloads thumbnail metadata when opened, and file-tree previews dismiss when keyboard focus leaves the tree item.
decisions.rationale: Current-session saves and keyboard navigation must be immediately truthful and non-sticky.

testEvidence.criterion: The corrected persistence and presentation implementation is type-safe, source-policy clean, provenance-valid, and behaviorally green.
testEvidence.test: Run static checks and focused persistence/presentation tests once.

red.outcome: RED: browser durable namespace and review-correction paths were not yet covered.

green.command: pnpm.cmd exec tsc --noEmit --pretty false; pnpm.cmd lint; pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/platform-desktop/desktop-thumbnail-persistence.test.ts tests/ui/files/ProjectLifecycleControls.test.tsx tests/ui/welcome/WelcomeLauncher.test.tsx tests/ui/viewer/ViewerPaneConnector.test.tsx; pnpm.cmd check:provenance; git diff --check
green.outcome: GREEN: TypeScript exited 0; source policy passed; focused tests 47/47 passed; provenance passed; diff check clean.

questions: Q-0037 remains open only for the M5 history-timeline thumbnail placement and project-level thumbnail selection; M4 capture, persistence, Welcome, and file-tree surfaces are delivered.
attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
